name: 8"x9" Round Plastic Easter Bucket with Stickers Dark Blue - Spritz™
description:
Add some fun to your Easter celebrations with the 8"x 9" Round Plastic Easter Bucket with Stickers Dark Blue - Spritz™. This sturdy bucket is perfect for egg hunts and carrying treats. It comes with colorful stickers for decorating, making it a hit with kids. The durable plastic ensures it can handle all the Easter excitement.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
